home.headline: Software your team will actually use.
home.subline: We build client portals, internal tools and custom websites on Softr, Airtable and Claude — fast, permissioned, and built to run for years. Premium & Enterprise Softr partner.

work.title: Client portals & internal tools
work.body: Permissioned apps on Softr and Airtable — portals, marketplaces, internal tools, job boards. The data model your business needs, with an interface people open every day.

work.title: Custom websites, built with Claude
work.body: Fast static websites — like this one — engineered to be found by Google and quoted by AI assistants. No bloat, no page-builder tax.

work.title: Migration & AI automation
work.body: WordPress-to-Softr migrations, plus the automations and AI integrations that wire the boring parts together — where they actually earn their place.

home.quote: Most software fails because nobody uses it. We build the version people open every day.

services.headline: What we build.
services.intro: One studio, four kinds of work — all built to be used, and all built to last. We start from the problem and the people who'll use it, then reach for the tool that earns its place.

offerings.title: Client portals & marketplaces
offerings.body: Authenticated portals, marketplaces and member sites on Softr + Airtable — roles, permissions and dashboards solved once and kept solved.

offerings.title: Internal tools & workflow apps
offerings.body: The app that replaces the spreadsheet: ordering systems, intranets, project trackers, knowledge bases. Fast to ship, easy to change.

offerings.title: Custom websites, built with Claude
offerings.body: Static, high-performance marketing and content sites — engineered for search and AI search from the first line of HTML.

offerings.title: WordPress → Softr migration
offerings.body: Move off a heavy WordPress stack onto something faster and cheaper to run, without losing your content or your SEO.

offerings.title: AI integration & automation
offerings.body: Make, REST APIs and AI wired into your workflow to remove steps nobody enjoys — measured against real outcomes, not novelty.

notes: Projects start at around €3,000. We scope honestly: if a smaller build or an off-the-shelf tool serves you better, we'll say so.
Supported data sources include Airtable, Softr Databases, Google Sheets, Supabase, Xano, SmartSuite and any REST API.

hosting.headline: Built, then kept running.
hosting.intro: Software isn't done when it ships — it's done when it's still fast, secure and useful a year later. Hosting & Care keeps your app that way, for a flat monthly fee, so you never think about infrastructure.

points.title: Hosting & uptime
points.body: Fast global hosting, HTTPS, backups and monitoring. If something breaks, we see it before you do.

points.title: Updates & small changes
points.body: Content updates, tweaks and small feature changes handled without a new project every time.

points.title: Support & training
points.body: A direct line for your team, plus training so the people who use the app can run it confidently.

hosting.note: Clean handoff, always: if you ever want to take the site or app in-house, it transfers to your own accounts — no lock-in.

studio.headline: One studio. Two decades of shipping.
body: Palma Design is led by Harald Palma — one of the few Premium & Enterprise Softr partners in the DACH region, and among Softr's top partners worldwide. Twenty-five years of design, 80+ clients globally, a registered and insured company.

We work in no-code and low-code — Softr, Airtable, Make, REST APIs — and drop to custom CSS and JavaScript when a project needs it. The tools change; the discipline doesn't: start from the problem, respect the constraints, and build the thing people will actually use.

principles.title: Built to be used
principles.body: An app nobody opens is a cost, not an asset. Usability is the whole point, not a finishing touch.

principles.title: Own the boring parts
principles.body: Auth, roles, budgets, documents — we solve them once so you never re-solve them.

principles.title: No lock-in
principles.body: Clean data models and a clean handoff. If you leave, you take everything with you.

contact.headline: Tell us what you need built.
contact.intro: The problem, roughly who'll use it, and any deadline you're working to. We scope honestly and reply personally.

faqs.a: We're a design and no-code studio in Vienna. We build client portals, internal tools and custom websites on Softr, Airtable and Claude — and keep them running through Hosting & Care.

Mainly Softr and Airtable for apps and portals, and static site tooling (built with Claude) for websites. We connect Make, REST APIs, Supabase, Xano and more, and add custom CSS/JavaScript when a project needs it.

faqs.q: How much does a project cost?
faqs.a: Projects start at around €3,000, depending on scope. We scope honestly up front — if a smaller build serves you better, we'll tell you.

faqs.q: Do you host and maintain what you build?
faqs.a: Yes. Hosting & Care is a flat monthly fee covering hosting, updates, monitoring, support and training — with a clean handoff if you ever want to bring it in-house.

faqs.q: Where are you based, and who do you work with?
faqs.a: Vienna — working across the DACH region and worldwide, in English, German and Spanish. Most work runs remotely; on-site where it makes sense.

footer.lead: Got a portal, internal tool or website that needs building? Let's scope it.
